_convention: Key format: category.scene_or_context.type.identifier — Examples: ui.new_game | scene.prologue.choice.inspect_bloodstain | scene.prologue.voice.die_ermittlerin.enter | scene.prologue.clue.bloodstain
scene.prologue.description: You wake in the gutter behind a coffeehouse. Beside you, a bloodstain on the cobblestones. It is not drying.
scene.prologue.voice.die_ermittlerin.ent: A stain that does not dry. Your dress is torn. The courtyard looks like a crime scene with worse coffee.
scene.prologue.voice.die_dame.enter: If you stand now, do it as though the gutter was an eccentric seating choice.
scene.prologue.voice.die_gosse.enter: Mizzi will see you any moment. Decide quickly: victim, customer, or problem?
scene.prologue.voice.die_hungrige.enter: Blood is blood. The question is whether this is a warning, a meal, or an invitation.
scene.prologue.voice.das_tierchen.enter: The cat is not blinking. Either it knows something, or it is working for someone.
scene.prologue.choice.stand_up_dignified: Stand up and act as though this was a chosen social position.
scene.prologue.choice.talk_to_mizzi_earl: Speak to Mizzi before she officially notices you.
scene.prologue.choice.flee_into_cafe: Slip into the back entrance of the coffeehouse.
scene.prologue.choice.search_pockets: Search your own pockets for clues.
scene.prologue.choice.look_in_reflection: Look at your own face in the reflection of a window.
scene.prologue.choice.glance_at_delivery: Take a brief look at the smudged delivery note.
scene.prologue.clue.bloodstain: The stain is not drying. It is too round, too orderly — placed rather than spilled.
scene.prologue.clue.brass_button: A brass button. Not from your dress. On the back, a small emblem: FMoGH.
scene.prologue.clue.delivery_note: A delivery note: coffee, milk, coal, bread. Between the line items, a stamp: FMoGH — inspection completed.
scene.prologue.clue.cellar_door: The cellar door looks ordinary. Its position is wrong.
scene.prologue.clue.pockets: No identity. No name. A bent hairpin, an unnamed receipt, a piece of sugar, and a scrap of paper with one word: voluntarily.
scene.prologue.zwirndl.three_clues_respo: Three clues. In Aurelstein, that is almost a personality.
